notes: Strong security posture: PBKDF2 310k iterations SHA-512, timing-safe comparisons for passwords and CSRF, anti-enumeration (fake delay on missing user, uniform 200 on password reset), httpOnly/secure/sameSite=strict cookies, Helmet with CSP+HSTS+preload, multi-layer rate limiting, bounded session store with eviction, session invalidation on password reset, single-use reset tokens. Deductions: metrics endpoint accessible to any authenticated user (info disclosure), weak password complexity validation (length-only, no character class requirements), inconsistent secure flag (conditional in setSessionCookie but hardcoded true in clearSessionCookie), console.log leaks reset token in plaintext, no structured logging or request correlation IDs, in-memory store not production-ready (no persistence, no horizontal scaling), O(n log n) eviction sort instead of LRU, no health check endpoint, no tests included.
